subject: Lakeview 10-room pilot -- our bid
snippet: Ed, our number for the ten-room refresh at Lakeview comes to $128,000 all in, fi
body: Ed, our number for the ten-room refresh at Lakeview comes to $128,000 all in, fixtures included. We can phase it.

subject: Lakeview renovation estimate
snippet: Mr. Byrd, Hollow Ridge can do the ten rooms for $145,000. Premium fixtures. Read
body: Mr. Byrd, Hollow Ridge can do the ten rooms for $145,000. Premium fixtures. Ready when you are.

subject: Fellowship hall -- change order CO-07
snippet: Ed, CO-07 is $6,300, which puts cumulative change orders at $47,800 against the
body: Ed, CO-07 is $6,300, which puts cumulative change orders at $47,800 against the $50,000 line the committee approved. Envelope is out for your signature.

subject: September commission statement
snippet: Your September OTA commission ran 15 percent. Note a disputed line for two Sunri
body: Your September OTA commission ran 15 percent. Note a disputed line for two Sunrise bookings.

subject: Rate sheet on file
snippet: Attached rate sheet has Sunrise ADR at $92. This is the 2025 sheet still floatin
body: Attached rate sheet has Sunrise ADR at $92. This is the 2025 sheet still floating around; the current board reads higher.

subject: P&L close prep
snippet: Ed, both books are ready for the monthly close. The September payroll run for th
body: Ed, both books are ready for the monthly close. The September payroll run for the second half is still unprocessed, flag it before it runs.

subject: My pledge
snippet: Ed, wanted to note I have paid $6,000 toward my pledge so far. I will get the la
body: Ed, wanted to note I have paid $6,000 toward my pledge so far. I will get the last $4,000 in before year end.

subject: Update before the congregation sees it
snippet: Ed, hold the congregation update until you and I have squared the raised-to-date
body: Ed, hold the congregation update until you and I have squared the raised-to-date figure. The binder number looks off.

subject: Gala catering -- headcount and agreement
snippet: We have you penciled for the gala. Please confirm the headcount and sign the ven
body: We have you penciled for the gala. Please confirm the headcount and sign the vendor agreement we sent.

subject: Lakeview insurance review
snippet: Reminder of the Lakeview property policy review on October 16.
body: Reminder of the Lakeview property policy review on October 16.
